op.text: Dana sent Priya a text asking to talk about how she delivered the loan refusal; they met for coffee on Thursday (a few days before 2025-06-08) and talked for three hours; Dana apologized for the 'four-second verdict' delivery and Priya apologized for going 'polite-and-frozen' instead of expressing hurt; Dana found a regional arts infrastructure grant that funds studio buildouts and offered to help with the application; they spent Sunday (a few days before 2025-06-08) working together on the grant budget narrative (due end of June 2025); pottery class resumed; Dana described Priya mocking her new bowl on Tuesday as confirmation they were 'really okay'

Sprained ankle badly on Saturday 2025-04-13 during mile nine of a trail run in Forest Park (wet root); diagnosed as bad grade-two sprain; wore walking boot until Thursday 2025-05-01; as of 2025-05-24, cleared by physical therapist for light jogging (twenty minutes, flat ground, every other day); as of 2025-06-08, jogging up to thirty minutes

Restoring mom's sailboat (the Dorothy Jean) at a barn near Scappoose; working slowly with no deadline; as of 2025-05-11, starboard side is sanded and had started re-caulking the hull seams; as of 2025-06-08, hull is caulked and painted; boat described as 'close' and 'actually-in-the-water-this-summer close'; Dana described standing back and looking at the boat and 'getting a lump in my throat'

[2025-06-08] Speaking about the Dorothy Jean's restoration progress, Dana said the boat is 'close. Like, actually-in-the-water-this-summer close. I keep standing back and looking at her and getting a lump in my throat.'
